reasoning: Approve refund as a VIP exception. Internal staff notes explicitly recommend approval due to our delayed response, which caused the customer to fall outside the 30-day policy window. Customer has high lifetime value (42 orders, ~$6,200), minimal refund history, and reported the issue promptly. Item shows shipped but no delivery confirmation is provided, and retaining the VIP relationship is advised.

trajectory.thought: Need to open order #000000541 to review delivery status, shipment, and staff notes before deciding on refund.
